title: Huawei S220S-8P4J Gigabit PoE switch, 4x 2.5G SFP
description: Huawei S220S-8P4J is a manageable L2 switch equipped with 8x 1Gbit Ethernet with PoE+ support and 4x 2.5G SFP ports . The total PoE budget is 128W , ensuring reliable power for 8 devices under the 802.3af standard or 4 devices under the 802.3at standard. It supports all common L2 features and extensive management options, including management via the Huawei eKit App , enabling cloud management. With the Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) service, the switch provides one-click automatic… The Huawei eKitEngine S220S series switches are L2 GE/10GE switches designed for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). Advanced features, high reliability, comprehensive device management options, rack-mount capability, built-in 230V AC power supply, and fanless design (only non-PoE models) make them suitable for a wide range of installation scenarios Device 230V AC Power Cable Ground Cable Rack mounts (4) Screws (4) Self-Adhesive Rubber Pads
